title: commerce.record_fulfillment@1.0.0 args — records a fulfillment FACT; the System derives status

order_id.description: Resolvable fact (§6.3). Aliases: orderId, order_number, reference_id.

event.description: The fulfillment fact being recorded. The System derives the order's fulfillment/lifecycle status from recorded facts; this verb never sets a status field (GAP-001, versions/0.2.0.md).

items.description: Optional per-line scope (D-1 level-1: array of scalar objects).

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339; when the fact occurred, if not now.

$comment: Intent = record what happened; the adapter derives its platform's status. Replaces the imperative commerce.update_order_status (fulfillment axis). workspace/store identity-injected server-side.
